work_item.description: Discover how claude-factory should handle per-project worktree setup for parallel development slices. The core problem: when the conductor creates a git worktree for an isolated development slice, the new worktree won't have untracked/gitignored files (.env, local config, build artifacts, language-version files, Nix dev shells, etc.) that are required to actually run/test the project. This is project-specific and could vary wildly (Nix flakes, Node/mise toolchains, database configs, secrets, etc.). Produce a product brief covering: the problem, target users, value proposition, and the four risks (value, usability, feasibility, viability), plus the workflows the solution must support.
